string 2:
Hey, I know you! You're the one who saved my friend, 
the chatterbox Kamemon, right?
It's just me here right now.

The others all left, but... I guess I was the only one crazy
enough to come back.
{next}Weren't you lonely?
{next}Why DID you come back?
{next}Let's go somewhere together!

I won't deny that, but... I was just so worried about this
place.

Well, I was just so worried about this place, and there was
something I had to check on.

I'd love that! I've been very lonely here. But... I can't
leave just yet. Sorry.

I heard rumors things settled down thanks to you, so I
thought it'd be safe to return.
Now the Titans are all gone, so... thanks for that. Only...
{next}Good riddance to those Titans!
{next}Sounds like there's a catch.
{next}Yes! Praise me more!

Right... I felt the same way at first. But... something's
been bothering me.

Yeah... you got it. Sorry! I know you worked hard to get
those Titans out of here.

Hahaha. Right... You're super awesome! Way to beat the
Titans! ...That good enough for you?

The thing is... I feel like there's a reason the Titans are gone 
besides all you did.

I'm not sure how to put this, but... I feel like they
weren't driven out. They just left.

Like... they did what they wanted to do, then took off
because there was no reason to stay.
{next}That's certainly possible.
{next}What do you think they wanted to do?
{next}You're overthinking things!

Oh, good! You get it! I've been thinking this through alone,
so I thought I might be nuts.

Well, I noticed something was different when I came back to
the village.

Oh... Y-You think? But... I've noticed something's
different.

Ever since I got back, the sea breeze hasn't smelled quite
right to me.

When Shellmon was here, we'd know right away if anything was
affecting the water.

But with Shellmon gone, I don't even know where to start.
How might we test the water?
{next}Ask another Digimon?
{next}Go to Shellmon's house?
{next}I could taste the water.

I don't know... Shellmon knew more about water than anyone.
Besides, no one's here.
Hey! That's a great idea! I know right where it is, too!

Uh... I think you'd better not. If it's bad, you're in for a
world of stomach hurt.

Heading to Shellmon's place is our best bet. Even with
Shellmon gone, it's worth a look!

You never know. Maybe we'll find some sort of tool in there
for measuring water quality.
What do you say? Are you in?
{next}I'm in.
{next}As long as it's worth my while.
{end}I'm busy right now.

Awesome! I'll feel a lot safer with you coming along.
Thanks!

What? Is that how it is with you? Well... I'm sure I can
think of a way to repay you.

Now's not a good time? Okay. Just stop by again when you can
make the trip.
You free to go to Shellmon's house now?
{next}Yeah, let's go.
{end}I'm still busy.
All right! I didn't have the heart to head there on my own.
Okay. Just stop by again when you can make the trip.
Follow me and we'll be there before you know it!

Well, here we are at Shellmon's house. It feels weird for me
to say it, but come on in.

I wonder how Shellmon's doing... On second thought, maybe I
shouldn't think about that.

Let's split up and search for a way to test the water. Let
me know if you find anything!
See anything that could be useful? I haven't had any luck.
But searching this place is our only hope. Let's keep at it!

There's tons of stuff in there. You think there'll be
anything important?
Hm... I have no idea what any of this stuff does.
I don't think we'll find anything useful here.

I doubt you'll find much in the bed. Wait... You weren't
thinking of a nap, were you?

If you can sleep here, after everything, you are something
else. But let's keep looking!
Oh! Hey, look at this! I think... Yes, it's a diary.

I don't know how I feel about reading someone else's
diary...
{next}This is important. We have to read it.
{next}I didn't know Shellmon kept a diary.
{next}Hm... Let me see...
You're right. There's no other way. Forgive us, Shellmon!

Shellmon is very serious. She told me she always writes down
anything important.

Wh-What's wrong with you? At least try to act reluctant!
Even if we DO have to read it...

Okay, let's see... Wow! Shellmon is so well-organized! This
thing's real easy to read.
Hey. Look at this! It's an entry about the water quality!

"Checked the aquatic plants again today. Blue for water
true; purple if it's hurtful."
{next}That's how we can check the water quality.
{next}So, will any aquatic plant do?
{next}Let's read more of Shellmon's secrets!
Yes. It's all right here. Shellmon... thank you!

Hmm... Apparently not. It has to be a special type that only
grows in one particular spot.

No way! We shouldn't be reading this diary to begin with.
Though I admit I am curious...

The diary cites the location of the plants we need to check,
too. I can get us there quick.

All right. Let's go take a look at those aquatic plants!
I'll take the lead again.

According to Shellmon's notes, we should find those aquatic
plants right around here.

It's just a matter of swimming from here on out. Only... the
thing is... I can't swim.
{next}I'll swim around and check by myself.
{next}Okay, so... what should I do again?
{next}You're a turtle that can't swim?

You will?! Oh, thank you! Sorry. I feel like I've had to
rely on you for everything.

Find the aquatic plant that checks quality. If the water's
bad, the plant will be purple.

I'm afraid so. But that makes me special! Like one of those
pigs or goldfish that fly!

All right. I'll wait here while you go look for that plant.
Good luck!

You still haven't found that aquatic plant. I'll wait right
here while you go get it!
{next}Okay. I'll look around some more.
{end}Sorry. I just remembered I have to leave.
Thanks! I hope you have better luck this time!

Oh. Then the search will just have to wait. Come back when
you're free. I'll be waiting!

You're back! Are you free to swim around and find that
aquatic plant now?
{next}Yeah. I'll get right to it.
{end}Not yet. Sorry.
Great! Thanks! I hope you have better luck this time!

Oh. So, you're still busy. In that case, come back when
you're all set!
There's a green plant under the water here.
There's a pink plant under the water here.
There's a yellow plant under the water here.
{next}There's a purple plant under the water here.
[Pick the plant.]
{end}[Leave the plant.]
Green Aquatic Plant obtained!
Pink Aquatic Plant obtained!
Yellow Aquatic Plant obtained!
Purple Aquatic Plant obtained!
There's something under the water here.
[Take it.]
[Leave it.]
You found an aquatic plant! Great job!

Let me see that. Uh... Hmm... This isn't the plant Shellmon
wrote about in her diary.

It should be a different color. Sorry, but you'll have to go
find another one!
You found an aquatic plant! Great job!

Let's see... Yes! That's the plant Shellmon wrote about for
checking the water quality!

Oh, but... what color was it supposed to be if the water is
good?
{next}Blue for water true.
{next}Purple for water true, right?
{next}Pink for nothing stinks, right?
Yes, that was it. You've got a great memory! I'm impressed.

Huh? That's not right. I think it was, "Blue for water true;
purple if it's hurtful."

Uh... I may not have the best memory, but I know that diary
said nothing about "pink."

But check out this plant! It's a faint purple, which means
the water's contaminated!

That must be why the sea breeze has smelled so wrong to me
since I got back!

Well, we really learned a lot. Thanks for all your help!
Here. Take this for your trouble.

I think I'll stay here. Even if everyone else is gone... I
want to look after the village.

I'll keep an eye on that plant so I can monitor the sea,
too. Don't worry. I'm good.

Best of luck with what you need to do, too! I may be here,
but I'll be thinking of you!

What do you want? Huh? Kamemon? So, you know the Kamemon
that was always around here, huh?

One day he just vanished. I wasn't keeping a close eye on
him, so I'm not quite sure when.

With the Titans showing up again, this place is getting
dangerous, so I'm worried...

Hey, guess what? You won't believe it! I hear all sorts of
things wash up around here!

Some of them are real nice and shiny! Sounds good, right?
Think you can swim out for some?

Hey! What's up? Where are you off to? We should search this
room some more!
